votes.reason: The Python code is a direct and accurate translation of the Coq definitions, preserving the logic for vowel checking, case swapping, vowel replacement, and the overall specification structure.
The Python code accurately translates the Coq definitions, including the vowel check, case swapping, vowel replacement, and the specifications for characters and strings.
The Python code accurately translates the Coq definitions, including the vowel checking, case swapping, vowel replacement, and the specifications for characters and strings.

The Python code correctly implements all the Coq definitions. is_vowel checks the same 10 vowel characters. swap_case uses the same ASCII arithmetic (65-90 for uppercase, 97-122 for lowercase, +/-32 for conversion). replace_vowel uses the same mapping for vowels shifted by 2 positions. encode_char_spec applies swap_case first then replace_vowel if the original character is a vowel, matching the Coq spec. problem_93_pre checks the same character constraints (letters or space). problem_93_spec uses Forall2 semantics requiring same length and pairwise encode_char_spec, which the Python correctly implements with length check and zip iteration.

The Python code correctly implements all the Coq definitions. is_vowel checks the same 10 vowel characters. swap_case uses the same ASCII arithmetic (65-90 for uppercase, 97-122 for lowercase, +/-32 for conversion). replace_vowel uses the same mapping for vowels shifted by 2 positions. encode_char_spec applies swap_case first then replace_vowel if the original character is a vowel, matching the Coq spec. problem_93_pre checks the same character constraints (letters or space). problem_93_spec uses Forall2 semantics requiring same length and pairwise encode_char_spec, which the Python correctly implements with length check and zip iteration.

Python mirrors Coq: same vowel set, ASCII case swap, vowel replacement applied after swap when original is a vowel, precondition allows only letters/spaces, and spec checks pairwise with equal lengths.

Python mirrors Coq: same vowel set, same case swap via ASCII ranges, same vowel replacement mapping applied after swapping when original is a vowel, spaces unchanged, and spec checks length and per-char relation. Matches on all allowed inputs.
Python mirrors Coq: same vowel set, ASCII range swap-case, vowel replacement mapping, precondition (letters or space), and per-character relation with equal-length check (Forall2).
